questions.question: What is the primary function of a Route in Laravel according to the text?
options: A) Connecting a URL request to a Controller using an HTTP method.
B) Displaying the User Interface (UI) to the user.
C) Storing data received from the Controller.
D) Defining the file location for imported files.
questions.correct_answer: A) Connecting a URL request to a Controller using an HTTP method.

questions.question: Which of the following is explicitly listed as an HTTP method in the provided content?
options: A) FETCH
B) UPLOAD
C) CONNECT
D) DOWNLOAD

questions.question: According to the text, what is the purpose of a Namespace?
options: A) To coordinate between routes, views, and models.
B) To define the file location for processes that are imported and called.
C) To prepare the UI for displaying data to the user.
D) To handle database operations and data storage.
questions.correct_answer: B) To define the file location for processes that are imported and called.

questions.question: What is the main responsibility of a View in Laravel, as described in the content?
options: A) Preparing the User Interface (UI) to display data received from the Controller to the user.
B) Intercepting HTTP requests and directing them to the appropriate Controller.
C) Serving as a class that mediates between routes and other application parts.
D) Generating and solving various problems like pulling and processing data.
questions.correct_answer: A) Preparing the User Interface (UI) to display data received from the Controller to the user.

questions.question: How is a Controller defined and what is its role in Laravel?
options: A) It is a file location for imported processes.
B) It is a class that coordinates between the route, view, model, and other parts of the Laravel application.
C) It is a part that prepares the UI to display data to the user.
D) It is a connection between a URL and a user request.
questions.correct_answer: B) It is a class that coordinates between the route, view, model, and other parts of the Laravel application.
